WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

 Formula guardedness
====================

  Lemma `L' cannot be converted to a guarded formula:
    unguarded variable(s) 'x', 'y', '#i', '#j' in the subformula
      "∀ x y #i #j. ((A( x ) @ #i) ∨ (B( y ) @ #j)) ⇒ (x = y)"
    in the formula
      "∀ x y #i #j. ((A( x ) @ #i) ∨ (B( y ) @ #j)) ⇒ (x = y)"
*/
